svg.title: Re-Tech Fusion — Architecture and Data Pipeline
svg.desc: Industrial energy intelligence stack: ESP32 sensors via MQTT, document extraction, unified data layer, LangGraph AI pipeline, and three delivery surfaces.

g.text: INSAT Carthage · May 1–3 2026 · ESP32 → MQTT → Unified Data → AI → Dashboard + Edge + Heat Recovery
staged practice data · GIT-IGNORED · SHA-pinned manifests
JSON payload: ts, value, unit, src
UNIFIED DATA LAYER — NESTJS + TIMESCALEDB + REDIS
NestJS 10 (Fastify) · Prisma · API + MQTT bridge + ai-bridge
modules: devices · readings · events · extracted-records · runs · scenarios
LangGraph Supervisor (Sonnet 4) · tool calls + checkpointing · apps/ai-agents
DELIVERY — DASHBOARD · EDGE · HEAT RECOVERY REPORT
Compass: does this change a number on the rubric or a story in the pitch? · Submission at H+22 of each part · Pitch quality > feature count
